beats.text: Two squad cars roll up slow, lightbar off. The neighbors crane over fences like meerkats.

beats.speaker: Officer Mendez
beats.text: Evening, sir. Got a call about a disturbance.
Karen's knuckles go white on the counter. Doug tries to look innocent and achieves the opposite.
Dad's mouth opens. Nothing comes out. Somewhere a dog barks. It feels personal.

end_a.text: Officer Mendez studies him for a long moment. 'Keep it down, sir.' The cars pull away. The yard does not breathe for twenty seconds.

end_b.text: Officer Mendez raises an eyebrow. Pockets his pen. 'Alright then.' Barb, across the yard, is already on the phone.
